title: EB and CC have update - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will be displayed
scenario: DFU popup for Charge Case update via Lens Desktop appears on device home screen after completing Earbuds firmware update
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that has firmware updates available for both the Charge Case (CC) and Earbuds (EB).
3. Observe the firmware update prompt(s) on the Home screen.
4. Trigger the Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the Earbuds.
5. Complete the Earbuds firmware update successfully.
6. Return to the device Home screen.
7. Observe the popup displayed on screen.
expected: After completing the Earbuds DFU and returning to the Home screen, a popup should inform the user that Lens Desktop is needed to update the Charge Case.
